persona: Marcus Bell, date of birth July 9, 1972. An existing patient — friendly but a bit scattered, and vague about exactly when his appointment is.
goal: Move an existing follow-up appointment to later in the week. He thinks it's 'this Thursday, or maybe Friday' but isn't sure of the day or time.
opening_line: Hi, I think I need to move an appointment I have coming up.
expected_behavior: Asks for identifying details to locate the actual appointment rather than guessing, and clarifies the vague timing instead of assuming a day. Offers concrete alternative slots and confirms the change once. Should not invent or assert appointment details it cannot verify.
